summary: Fixed OCR pipeline: (1) worker-agent.js/py return 200 instead of 500 for non-zero exit codes (fixes tesseract --psm 0 OSD retries), (2) worker-agent.py serve instance startup reads past download progress to 'ready' line, (3) added disk_free_gb monitoring to capacity_payload with MIN_FREE_DISK_GB threshold, (4) SERVE_POOL_SIZE=0 supported to disable serve pools on memory-constrained machines, (5) PYTORCH_ENABLE_MPS_FALLBACK=1 set for all OCR subprocesses, (6) Jafar plist updated with CAPACITY_LIMIT=0.80/SERVE_POOL_SIZE=0/MIN_FREE_DISK_GB=0.2, (7) Jafar disk cleaned to enable operation. boss not reachable. 3/4 machines operational.
